In your March 1, 1976 memorandum it states

sections.question: Please advise if I should forward Statements of Economic Interest Forms 720 and 721 to your office. In your March 1, 1976 memorandum it states that the original form should be mailed to your office and in the Manual for said forms it indicates that I should retain the original in my office. Also could you advise me as to when I should expect revisions to the "Handbook for Election Officials". The latest copy that I have of same is dated December 1975.
sections.question_synthetic: The City Clerk of Gilroy is seeking clarification on whether Statements of Economic Interest Forms 720 and 721 should be forwarded to the FPPC, as there is conflicting guidance between a March 1976 memorandum and the forms manual. She also inquires about the status of revisions to the Handbook for Election Officials, noting her copy is from December 1975.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: This is an incoming request letter to the FPPC, not a response. No conclusion or FPPC response is included in the document. The document appears duplicated in the text. Handwritten annotations visible but not clearly legible. No formal FPPC response section found.

embedding.summary: Incoming request from Susanne E. Steinmetz, City Clerk of Gilroy, California, dated January 7, 1977, asking for clarification on Form 720/721 submission procedures and the status of updates to the Handbook for Election Officials.
